summary: subject_re regex duplicated in determine_bump() and generate_changelog() functions should be factored to module constant. Commits file format spec ('blocks separated by blank lines or just newline-separated subjects') is vague—document formally. JSON parsing via grep/sed could fail on unusual formatting (nested quotes, multiline). Workflow layout is appropriate; good die() function and error handling. All workflow steps should have set -euo pipefail for consistency. Otherwise solid modular design and testability.
